community.description: AGPL-3.0 self-hosted deployment. No managed billing; you run your own infrastructure. Use your own Anthropic API key for chat.
community.name: Community

enterprise.description: Custom limits, SSO, white-label branding, and dedicated support for organizations.
enterprise.name: Enterprise

free.description: Structural workspace shell for signup. Start a 14-day trial on Starter or Pro to unlock the platform.
free.name: Free

pro.description: For teams that need collaboration, automation, and higher usage limits.
pro.name: Pro

starter.description: For solo developers and small projects with AI-powered content management.
starter.name: Starter
